declared.title: Rising Repression Meets Global Resistance: Internet Shutdowns in 2025
declared.selection_rationale: Access Now's #KeepItOn annual shutdown report for 2025, the most recent complete year in this corpus's 2022-2025 window. Confirmed live via direct fetch, 2026-07-20 — documents Tanzania heavily (8 shutdowns, the most of any target country that year, tied to the December 2025 election-related protest crackdown with reported unlawful use of lethal force), and notes Kenya's Telegram block during national exams happening "for the third year in a row" — a direct cross-reference to this corpus's existing OONI entry (ooni-ke-2025-telegram-kcse-blocking), the same event corroborated from a second organization's tracking methodology. Publication date (2026-03) follows the same lag pattern as every other annual report already in this corpus (each publishes several months after the calendar year it covers) — the document's actual subject matter is squarely inside the 2022-2025 window, only its publication date exceeds it, consistent with how the existing 2023/2024 reports are already treated.
